issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for file operations and unsupported features.

scenarios.name: Generate sales-report PPTX from JSON
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knew python-pptx basics but mixed up layout indices and skipped CategoryChartData/XL_CHART_TYPE typing; treatment used the documented chart and table helpers with Inches positioning and saved a clean .pptx.

scenarios.name: Batch template rebrand
scenarios.rationale: Baseline overwrote text_frame.text directly (destroying fonts) and saved over the source; treatment iterated paragraph.runs to preserve formatting and wrote to a new updated/ path per the guidelines.
